workLog.task: Issue #2036: extract_session_episode.py parses markdown line-by-line but session logs are JSON, so every episode got outcome=failure and all-error events (corrupting ADR-038 Tier 2 memory; pre-commit hook regenerates them)
workLog.outcome: Added a JSON path that derives outcome from protocolCompliance.sessionEnd MUST gates and types events from the workLog structure, not substring matching. Hardened for three real workLog shapes: {task,outcome,evidence}, {action,outcome}, and bare strings. Counted-failure regex ([1-9]\d* failed/errors) replaces the substring fail/error match that misfired on '0 errors' and 'test still fails'. Legacy markdown path preserved behind format detection. Added JSON tests to the CI-collected location (tests/skills/memory) plus the skill-local copy, synced to copilot. Regenerated 49 episodes from their source logs.
workLog.evidence: pytest tests/skills/memory -> 43 passed; .claude + copilot -> 63 passed; episodes with outcome=failure 17 -> 1 (orphan fixture filter-002 has no source log)

nextSteps: The synthetic orphan episode-2026-01-01-filter-002.json has no source log; left as-is
